label: A안 — 인물+구체사건 (승리 공식)
prompt_en: Photorealistic portrait of Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Chair, in a dark navy suit, standing in front of a massive red digital display showing '4.2%' in glowing numbers. His expression is deeply troubled, brow furrowed, jaw tight, one hand gripping a podium. Behind him, multiple screens show crashing stock charts with red downward arrows. The lighting is dramatic with warm gold highlights on his face contrasting with cold blue-red screens behind. The atmosphere is tense and urgent, like a crisis war room. Shot from a slightly low angle to emphasize gravity. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: B안 — 차트/오브젝트 중심
prompt_en: Photorealistic image of Rhee Chang-yong, Bank of Korea Governor, sitting at the Monetary Policy Board meeting table, looking conflicted with his hands clasped together. In front of him, a split holographic display shows two paths: left side glowing green with '2.5% HOLD' and right side glowing red with '2.75% HIKE'. The background shows the Bank of Korea building interior with its distinctive columns. Gold and navy color accents. His expression shows the weight of an impossible decision. The mood is heavy and consequential. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
person: Rhee Chang-yong, Bank of Korea Governor

label: C안 — 와일드카드 (다른 인물)
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Donald Trump, US President, in a dark suit and red tie, standing in the White House Situation Room. His expression is stern and combative, pointing forcefully at a large military tactical screen showing a map of the Strait of Hormuz with red strike markers. Behind him, military advisors in uniform are visible, out of focus. The room is bathed in blue-toned monitor light with red alert indicators. The atmosphere is high-stakes and confrontational. Oil price ticker showing '$100+' visible on one of the screens. Navy and gold color accents throughout. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
